paragraph_text: Welcome to the Ducks Date community. If you are honest, kind and respectful towards others, we will always be glad to see you here. However, if you behave differently, unfortunately, we will be forced to part with you. Our goal is for users to be able to express themselves freely as long as it doesn't hurt the feelings of others. There is a single standard of behavior for everyone on Tinder. We ask you to treat others with respect, think carefully about your actions and follow the rules of our community both online and offline. That's right: your offline behavior may lead to the blocking of your Tinder account.
